context.projectOverview: Calendar planner sub-system for agent-bober's knowledge platform. Consumes pre-ranked Findings from the priority hub and places them into open calendar slots via a DETERMINISTIC synchronous slotter (the LLM never packs slots), proposes through the existing approve/steer gate, and writes via a connector-agnostic interface (.ics local-first + Google MCP). This Sprint 1 builds ONLY the deterministic slot-fill engine, the Finding consume-type, a JSON finding-source, and a `bober calendar plan --dry-run` CLI that writes nothing.
relevantFiles: src/medical/numerics.ts (COPY the purity contract EXACTLY: pure synchronous, no async/fs/network/LLM import, identical input => identical output, closed enum + exhaustive switch + never guard)
src/cli/commands/medical.ts (model the extracted-core runWhoopSync pattern: runCalendarPlan(projectRoot, opts, deps) with injectable deps, chalk output, process.exitCode on failure)
src/cli/index.ts (register the calendar command next to registerMedicalCommand near line 319)
src/config/schema.ts (reference only this sprint; SlotConstraints is a plain TS type, no config section yet)
.bober/research/research-20260627-knowledge-platform-landscape.md lines 115-135 (Finding schema + 'do NOT let the LLM pack slots')
.bober/principles.md (ESM .js imports, node:fs/promises only, type-only imports, unicode section headers, collocated *.test.ts)
